heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 4808 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each of the fiscal years 1991 and 1992 such sums as may be necessary not to exceed $5,000,000 to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Amendments1990— substituted “1991 and 1992” for “1989 and 1990”.Pub. L. 101–382
amendments: Amendments1990— substituted “1991 and 1992” for “1989 and 1990”.Pub. L. 101–382
